User.title: User
User.description: A user of the system (Student, Teacher, Assistant, or Admin).

uid.description: The unique ID from Firebase Auth.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

status.description: Whether the user is active or blocked.

id.description: The unique ID of the lab.

name.description: The name of the lab (e.g., Lab A).

description.description: A brief description of the lab.

totalPCs.description: The total number of PCs in the lab.

location.description: The physical location of the lab.

Computer.title: Computer
Computer.description: A specific PC in a lab.

id.description: The unique ID of the computer.

labId.description: The ID of the lab this computer belongs to.

pcNumber.description: The number assigned to the PC (e.g., PC-01).

status.description: The current status of the PC.

id.description: The unique ID of the booking.

userId.description: The ID of the user who made the booking.

computerId.description: The ID of the computer booked.

startTime.description: The start time of the booking.

endTime.description: The end time of the booking.

/labs/{labId}/computers/{computerId}.description: Stores computer information within a lab.
